channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. July Community Q&A | Halo: Campaign Evolved | Halo - Official Site (en)  Halo Waypoint
  3. After Sony Kills PS5 Discs and GTA 6 is Just a Code in a Box, Xbox Is Using Halo: Campaign Evolved's Physical Disc as a Selling Point  IGN
  4. As physical games disappear, Halo: Campaign Evolved goes against the grain  Windows Central
  5. Microsoft confirms Halo discs: PS5 gets a boxed edition  en.softonic.com

item.title: A MAJOR change is afoot at Xbox's Arkane Studios and MachineGames - Windows Central
item.description:
1. A MAJOR change is afoot at Xbox's Arkane Studios and MachineGames  Windows Central
  2. Arkane Studios chief quits, replaced by Machine Games lead Jerk Gustafsson | report (updated)  GamesBeat
  3. MachineGames boss takes over Arkane, amid Blade cancellation reports  Video Games Chronicle
  4. As major Xbox shake-ups loom, former Wolfenstein…  inkl
  5. Arkane Could Still Be On The Chopping Block, As New President Was Actually Appointed In 2025  TheGamer
